user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter the confirmation review list by active or inactive employees, so that I can focus on the relevant workforce segment
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Review screen; When I select Active Employees or Inactive Employees; Then the list shows only employees matching that state

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter confirmation reviews by a From and To period using the calendar pickers, so that I can review confirmations due within a date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Review screen; When I choose a From and To date and search; Then only reviews with due dates in that range are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter reviews by status such as Pending with me, Pending Confirmation, Confirmed, Extended Probation or Terminated, so that I can act on the right confirmation cases
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Review screen; When I select a Status value; Then the list is filtered to employees in that confirmation status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter confirmation reviews by department, so that I can review confirmations for a specific team
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Review screen; When I select a department from Select Department; Then only employees in that department are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset the filters, so that I can run new queries without manually clearing each field
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set confirmation review filters; When I click Search; Then results update, and When I click Reset; Then all filters clear to defaults

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see each employee's joining date, confirmation review due date and confirmation status in the list, so that I can track pending confirmations at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given confirmation reviews are listed; When the grid loads; Then each row shows employee name, code, class, department, position level, reporting manager, date of joining, confirmation review due date and status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to open the confirmation task action for an employee, so that I can initiate or complete the confirmation review
acceptance_criteria: Given an employee has a pending confirmation task in the list; When I open the Task action for that row; Then I can act on the confirmation review
